violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
Staff were observed not washing hands between changing tasks (handling money and handling food). PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024

Frozen calzones were observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. PIC placed in refrigerator. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -vents of open-air cases -base/shelf of ice cream reach-in. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024
The spray hose at the 3-bay sink was in poor repair, observed wrapped with tape. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

The fan guards and floor under the eggs in the walk-in have an accumulation of residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the restroom area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

Thermometers are lacking in the open air case refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Digital thermometer observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler shelves an accumulation of black residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
